name: Perry Robinson
abstract: Perry Morris Robinson (September 17, 1938 – December 2, 2018) was an American jazz clarinetist and composer. He was the son of composer Earl Robinson.

concerts.label: Dave Brubeck Quartet/ Gerry Mulligan/ Paul Desmond/ Darius Brubeck Ensemble
Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck and Two Generations of Brubeck, with Paul Desmond, Alto Saxophone

about_quotes.speaker: Michael White
about_quotes.evidence: I sat in with him... I ended up playing a festival with him, the Vision Festival in New York... I also played with Perry in New York a few other times
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael White interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 10, 2025
